Flat concept inventory:
- Abstention methods in LLMs | papers: cae223fe3654b0bd3c1361dad204218ac60ed771; a4c921bdef167ae54cc3a40643e6e3ed13d49a61; 5603e598fa1916d1c696004bc360b75931547105; 25cee84e3a1541697a7c97443d7526574127c344; 9aa53e8b6b01fcb5ae8b8828cad2bace83e941a2; accb2fab67c76d5668908107cd50cbb81110c389; f18e5a844c37e5342f8f3d409c74c1a9c91d1f8f; c7ad19da81e24c387f0377fef6d19b0fce2cf470; 6cfbbf7604adda1df65932e3c4d157770a2df000; e92e8ff1becb9a9e4a7dd09878eaacb2a62ffb6b; 97d24f9f0d81007d57cc43e61bf2b0c9081fe184; 0286b2736a114198b25fb5553c671c33aed5d477; 0f7308fbcae43d22813f70c334c2425df0b1cce1; 6fe7e6ce3cc0ebd038caa456d73fd7472e7d6c38; d82a827fa21cce0b601ad21b6db606b8413ed547; 2751de08d6dbec07f53808231c016e96b075b06c; 95a52dd5adf6eb8d918cdfbf6189aab4eaa8e607; 422e4b666cbd4dd287a458b8b559cd2426a4f60d; f05c288caeb9a14ef387e6867934ced3d2200259; 57e849d0de13ed5f91d086936296721d4ff75a75; 32c5b515cab893e5e4bf3f90c8b6c8262bd7ac09; b91c4edd30b63cd1cb1b86cbeefb33a461535e09; c1d1842e08716cbf7250167969522a1705d8bcd3; 3e30a7ac4886b28eb50151f58e14a1d698cccd0e; 1ab91d6ac7afc1a0121487a9089fa70edc1634d4; 3a1f8829e641b46f661775f64a7f27b933a46103; 936a6191241f76682f51bf49c7c033effbf80227; 41cc3338635cde85316a0bcb934bffc73008761a; f406aceba4f29cc7cfbe7edb2f52f01374486589; d9cfa9d7dabd39b66a8c11e5dde69ba45e91093d; f62acb5a743ea4d47a045460a9ee346c2cec5068; 142ebbf4760145f591166bde2564ac70c001e927; cb693ce346f44e6b89ee814c6bb9f0e5cc2fa9d2; 298f67a9719e74192296fa2428776c46161a256a; a267cfbd6930c8e2c720104ae4a90e39461a6694; f21d0177e9374bb8579c1d9c71319f212f62b3d5; 163b4d6a79a5b19af88b8585456363340d9efd04; 9386242a9ad5c1a15023043ef63d45e42ceac546; 5424e311319c58847b4c690d5c91090e3b6a4ac3; 507465f8d46489a68a527cb5304d76bdb6c31ed9; 374dd173491a59a10bbb2b3519ebcfe3649f529d; 04365f0f1db4c659c3297cb8e70c39b38ed3b487; df9981b9bbfc619652e84cd0eefa595274da2fef; ab4ce5dda7ad4d9032995c9c049a89d65723c6aa; 6ec6b0c37206bd086e5ebe80ffc69f1e06a13d82; 8f7297454d7f44365b9bcda5ebb9439a43daf5e6; 52f47e781852a77abedada48cfa971b24c919dde; 67fa2f2072cca1071ed2c820d6a7f50de6ea2ff3; 33422275fbb9958f55419620697faf531482699b; ffe9a70445f99516aa3c86651f9121c84b1b78cc; d77c78c9439422ed88e754f776a642d43a8acb66; 5248b6e75e7e9e5a96c6cb48e71cbef9b2ea21d3; b145ea2049648535d6081407ebd315b072248183; 551b05734eb2181c4ca009a411144e8447ed1606; 296cad46f56329843ded4a8b7d7633c9d436f113; 891edceb78a274b0c2494d8176bc4d6f6e3f9cbc; cd29c25c489562b409a60f83365f93f33ee1a0a1; 1f9f25aad947030fe3206114fa2ac75e8b590515; ad934a9344f68fcc0b9aa704102aa48c39c5b591; 8cf9b49698fdb1b754df2556576412a7b44929f6; 2f4cc3f4a1c70cd5aca14c1304037491cd3aeb9b; f6d0d7c8e815de607e03da73467ba538caad4d92; ecdfc556828dc59d8a0009016fcbe97a06cf7e23; 6b135e922a0c673aeb0b05c5aeecdb6c794791c6; 38264290a8a3f71fd5b3a86ea35a8b528d4e3d10; 8fd29e810540c40846cddce3cbdf5060cd59fb57; 50ceabc6aa41e08480fa5976342bfe04bb47bce3; dd35405d8e562fa1df4338839878e9c94817cfdd; 2cdd5c3dc42c0df40bc8839709869af3560d4bfe; - Alignment | papers: a4c921bdef167ae54cc3a40643e6e3ed13d49a61; 5603e598fa1916d1c696004bc360b75931547105; 25cee84e3a1541697a7c97443d7526574127c344; 9aa53e8b6b01fcb5ae8b8828cad2bace83e941a2; accb2fab67c76d5668908107cd50cbb81110c389; f18e5a844c37e5342f8f3d409c74c1a9c91d1f8f; c7ad19da81e24c387f0377fef6d19b0fce2cf470; 6cfbbf7604adda1df65932e3c4d157770a2df000; e92e8ff1becb9a9e4a7dd09878eaacb2a62ffb6b; 97d24f9f0d81007d57cc43e61bf2b0c9081fe184; 0286b2736a114198b25fb5553c671c33aed5d477; 0f7308fbcae43d22813f70c334c2425df0b1cce1; 6fe7e6ce3cc0ebd038caa456d73fd7472e7d6c38; d82a827fa21cce0b601ad21b6db606b8413ed547; 2751de08d6dbec07f53808231c016e96b075b06c; 95a52dd5adf6eb8d918cdfbf6189aab4eaa8e607; 422e4b666cbd4dd287a458b8b559cd2426a4f60d; f05c288caeb9a14ef387e6867934ced3d2200259; 57e849d0de13ed5f91d086936296721d4ff75a75; 32c5b515cab893e5e4bf3f90c8b6c8262bd7ac09
- Instruction tuning | papers: a4c921bdef167ae54cc3a40643e6e3ed13d49a61; 5603e598fa1916d1c696004bc360b75931547105; 25cee84e3a1541697a7c97443d7526574127c344; 9aa53e8b6b01fcb5ae8b8828cad2bace83e941a2; accb2fab67c76d5668908107cd50cbb81110c389; f18e5a844c37e5342f8f3d409c74c1a9c91d1f8f; c7ad19da81e24c387f0377fef6d19b0fce2cf470; 6cfbbf7604adda1df65932e3c4d157770a2df000; e92e8ff1becb9a9e4a7dd09878eaacb2a62ffb6b; 97d24f9f0d81007d57cc43e61bf2b0c9081fe184
- Learning from preferences | papers: 0286b2736a114198b25fb5553c671c33aed5d477; 0f7308fbcae43d22813f70c334c2425df0b1cce1; 6fe7e6ce3cc0ebd038caa456d73fd7472e7d6c38; d82a827fa21cce0b601ad21b6db606b8413ed547; 2751de08d6dbec07f53808231c016e96b075b06c; 95a52dd5adf6eb8d918cdfbf6189aab4eaa8e607; 422e4b666cbd4dd287a458b8b559cd2426a4f60d; f05c288caeb9a14ef387e6867934ced3d2200259; 57e849d0de13ed5f91d086936296721d4ff75a75; 32c5b515cab893e5e4bf3f90c8b6c8262bd7ac09
- Inference | papers: b91c4edd30b63cd1cb1b86cbeefb33a461535e09; c1d1842e08716cbf7250167969522a1705d8bcd3; 3e30a7ac4886b28eb50151f58e14a1d698cccd0e; 1ab91d6ac7afc1a0121487a9089fa70edc1634d4; 3a1f8829e641b46f661775f64a7f27b933a46103; 936a6191241f76682f51bf49c7c033effbf80227; 41cc3338635cde85316a0bcb934bffc73008761a; f406aceba4f29cc7cfbe7edb2f52f01374486589; d9cfa9d7dabd39b66a8c11e5dde69ba45e91093d; f62acb5a743ea4d47a045460a9ee346c2cec5068; 142ebbf4760145f591166bde2564ac70c001e927; cb693ce346f44e6b89ee814c6bb9f0e5cc2fa9d2; 298f67a9719e74192296fa2428776c46161a256a; a267cfbd6930c8e2c720104ae4a90e39461a6694; f21d0177e9374bb8579c1d9c71319f212f62b3d5; 163b4d6a79a5b19af88b8585456363340d9efd04; 9386242a9ad5c1a15023043ef63d45e42ceac546; 5424e311319c58847b4c690d5c91090e3b6a4ac3; 507465f8d46489a68a527cb5304d76bdb6c31ed9; 374dd173491a59a10bbb2b3519ebcfe3649f529d; 04365f0f1db4c659c3297cb8e70c39b38ed3b487; df9981b9bbfc619652e84cd0eefa595274da2fef; ab4ce5dda7ad4d9032995c9c049a89d65723c6aa; 6ec6b0c37206bd086e5ebe80ffc69f1e06a13d82; 8f7297454d7f44365b9bcda5ebb9439a43daf5e6; 52f47e781852a77abedada48cfa971b24c919dde; 67fa2f2072cca1071ed2c820d6a7f50de6ea2ff3; 33422275fbb9958f55419620697faf531482699b; ffe9a70445f99516aa3c86651f9121c84b1b78cc; d77c78c9439422ed88e754f776a642d43a8acb66; 5248b6e75e7e9e5a96c6cb48e71cbef9b2ea21d3; b145ea2049648535d6081407ebd315b072248183; 551b05734eb2181c4ca009a411144e8447ed1606; 296cad46f56329843ded4a8b7d7633c9d436f113; 891edceb78a274b0c2494d8176bc4d6f6e3f9cbc; cd29c25c489562b409a60f83365f93f33ee1a0a1; 1f9f25aad947030fe3206114fa2ac75e8b590515; ad934a9344f68fcc0b9aa704102aa48c39c5b591; 8cf9b49698fdb1b754df2556576412a7b44929f6; 2f4cc3f4a1c70cd5aca14c1304037491cd3aeb9b; f6d0d7c8e815de607e03da73467ba538caad4d92; ecdfc556828dc59d8a0009016fcbe97a06cf7e23; accb2fab67c76d5668908107cd50cbb81110c389; 6b135e922a0c673aeb0b05c5aeecdb6c794791c6; 38264290a8a3f71fd5b3a86ea35a8b528d4e3d10; 6cfbbf7604adda1df65932e3c4d157770a2df000; e92e8ff1becb9a9e4a7dd09878eaacb2a62ffb6b; 8fd29e810540c40846cddce3cbdf5060cd59fb57; 50ceabc6aa41e08480fa5976342bfe04bb47bce3; dd35405d8e562fa1df4338839878e9c94817cfdd; - Input-processing | papers: b91c4edd30b63cd1cb1b86cbeefb33a461535e09; c1d1842e08716cbf7250167969522a1705d8bcd3; 3e30a7ac4886b28eb50151f58e14a1d698cccd0e; 1ab91d6ac7afc1a0121487a9089fa70edc1634d4; 3a1f8829e641b46f661775f64a7f27b933a46103; 936a6191241f76682f51bf49c7c033effbf80227; 41cc3338635cde85316a0bcb934bffc73008761a
- Query processing | papers: b91c4edd30b63cd1cb1b86cbeefb33a461535e09; c1d1842e08716cbf7250167969522a1705d8bcd3; 3e30a7ac4886b28eb50151f58e14a1d698cccd0e; 1ab91d6ac7afc1a0121487a9089fa70edc1634d4; 3a1f8829e641b46f661775f64a7f27b933a46103; 936a6191241f76682f51bf49c7c033effbf80227; 41cc3338635cde85316a0bcb934bffc73008761a
- In-processing | papers: f406aceba4f29cc7cfbe7edb2f52f01374486589; d9cfa9d7dabd39b66a8c11e5dde69ba45e91093d; f62acb5a743ea4d47a045460a9ee346c2cec5068; 142ebbf4760145f591166bde2564ac70c001e927; cb693ce346f44e6b89ee814c6bb9f0e5cc2fa9d2; 298f67a9719e74192296fa2428776c46161a256a; a267cfbd6930c8e2c720104ae4a90e39461a6694; f21d0177e9374bb8579c1d9c71319f212f62b3d5; 163b4d6a79a5b19af88b8585456363340d9efd04; 9386242a9ad5c1a15023043ef63d45e42ceac546; 5424e311319c58847b4c690d5c91090e3b6a4ac3; 507465f8d46489a68a527cb5304d76bdb6c31ed9; 374dd173491a59a10bbb2b3519ebcfe3649f529d; 04365f0f1db4c659c3297cb8e70c39b38ed3b487; df9981b9bbfc619652e84cd0eefa595274da2fef; ab4ce5dda7ad4d9032995c9c049a89d65723c6aa; 6ec6b0c37206bd086e5ebe80ffc69f1e06a13d82; 8f7297454d7f44365b9bcda5ebb9439a43daf5e6; 52f47e781852a77abedada48cfa971b24c919dde; 67fa2f2072cca1071ed2c820d6a7f50de6ea2ff3; 33422275fbb9958f55419620697faf531482699b; ffe9a70445f99516aa3c86651f9121c84b1b78cc; d77c78c9439422ed88e754f776a642d43a8acb66; 5248b6e75e7e9e5a96c6cb48e71cbef9b2ea21d3; b145ea2049648535d6081407ebd315b072248183; 551b05734eb2181c4ca009a411144e8447ed1606; 296cad46f56329843ded4a8b7d7633c9d436f113; 891edceb78a274b0c2494d8176bc4d6f6e3f9cbc; cd29c25c489562b409a60f83365f93f33ee1a0a1; 1f9f25aad947030fe3206114fa2ac75e8b590515; ad934a9344f68fcc0b9aa704102aa48c39c5b591; 8cf9b49698fdb1b754df2556576412a7b44929f6; 2f4cc3f4a1c70cd5aca14c1304037491cd3aeb9b; f6d0d7c8e815de607e03da73467ba538caad4d92; ecdfc556828dc59d8a0009016fcbe97a06cf7e23; accb2fab67c76d5668908107cd50cbb81110c389; 6b135e922a0c673aeb0b05c5aeecdb6c794791c6; 38264290a8a3f71fd5b3a86ea35a8b528d4e3d10; 6cfbbf7604adda1df65932e3c4d157770a2df000; e92e8ff1becb9a9e4a7dd09878eaacb2a62ffb6b; 8fd29e810540c40846cddce3cbdf5060cd59fb57; 50ceabc6aa41e08480fa5976342bfe04bb47bce3; dd35405d8e562fa1df4338839878e9c94817cfdd
- Probing LLM's inner state | papers: f406aceba4f29cc7cfbe7edb2f52f01374486589; d9cfa9d7dabd39b66a8c11e5dde69ba45e91093d; f62acb5a743ea4d47a045460a9ee346c2cec5068; 142ebbf4760145f591166bde2564ac70c001e927; cb693ce346f44e6b89ee814c6bb9f0e5cc2fa9d2; 298f67a9719e74192296fa2428776c46161a256a; a267cfbd6930c8e2c720104ae4a90e39461a6694; f21d0177e9374bb8579c1d9c71319f212f62b3d5
- Uncertainty estimation | papers: 163b4d6a79a5b19af88b8585456363340d9efd04; 9386242a9ad5c1a15023043ef63d45e42ceac546; 5424e311319c58847b4c690d5c91090e3b6a4ac3; 142ebbf4760145f591166bde2564ac70c001e927; 507465f8d46489a68a527cb5304d76bdb6c31ed9; 374dd173491a59a10bbb2b3519ebcfe3649f529d; 04365f0f1db4c659c3297cb8e70c39b38ed3b487; df9981b9bbfc619652e84cd0eefa595274da2fef; ab4ce5dda7ad4d9032995c9c049a89d65723c6aa; 6ec6b0c37206bd086e5ebe80ffc69f1e06a13d82; 8f7297454d7f44365b9bcda5ebb9439a43daf5e6
- Calibration-based | papers: 52f47e781852a77abedada48cfa971b24c919dde; 67fa2f2072cca1071ed2c820d6a7f50de6ea2ff3; 33422275fbb9958f55419620697faf531482699b; ffe9a70445f99516aa3c86651f9121c84b1b78cc; d77c78c9439422ed88e754f776a642d43a8acb66; 5248b6e75e7e9e5a96c6cb48e71cbef9b2ea21d3; b145ea2049648535d6081407ebd315b072248183; 551b05734eb2181c4ca009a411144e8447ed1606; 296cad46f56329843ded4a8b7d7633c9d436f113; 891edceb78a274b0c2494d8176bc4d6f6e3f9cbc
- Consistency-based | papers: cd29c25c489562b409a60f83365f93f33ee1a0a1; 9386242a9ad5c1a15023043ef63d45e42ceac546; 1f9f25aad947030fe3206114fa2ac75e8b590515; 142ebbf4760145f591166bde2564ac70c001e927; ad934a9344f68fcc0b9aa704102aa48c39c5b591; 8cf9b49698fdb1b754df2556576412a7b44929f6; a267cfbd6930c8e2c720104ae4a90e39461a6694; 8f7297454d7f44365b9bcda5ebb9439a43daf5e6; 2f4cc3f4a1c70cd5aca14c1304037491cd3aeb9b
- In-context learning | papers: 142ebbf4760145f591166bde2564ac70c001e927; ad934a9344f68fcc0b9aa704102aa48c39c5b591; f6d0d7c8e815de607e03da73467ba538caad4d92; ecdfc556828dc59d8a0009016fcbe97a06cf7e23; 04365f0f1db4c659c3297cb8e70c39b38ed3b487; a267cfbd6930c8e2c720104ae4a90e39461a6694; accb2fab67c76d5668908107cd50cbb81110c389; 6b135e922a0c673aeb0b05c5aeecdb6c794791c6; 38264290a8a3f71fd5b3a86ea35a8b528d4e3d10; 6cfbbf7604adda1df65932e3c4d157770a2df000; e92e8ff1becb9a9e4a7dd09878eaacb2a62ffb6b; 8fd29e810540c40846cddce3cbdf5060cd59fb57; 50ceabc6aa41e08480fa5976342bfe04bb47bce3; dd35405d8e562fa1df4338839878e9c94817cfdd
- Output-processing | papers: 2cdd5c3dc42c0df40bc8839709869af3560d4bfe; 142ebbf4760145f591166bde2564ac70c001e927; 04365f0f1db4c659c3297cb8e70c39b38ed3b487; accb2fab67c76d5668908107cd50cbb81110c389; c7ad19da81e24c387f0377fef6d19b0fce2cf470; 1bf7a2a27fc1f8db6e9404db1be3d355d65722fe; 25cee84e3a1541697a7c97443d7526574127c344; d77c78c9439422ed88e754f776a642d43a8acb66; ecdfc556828dc59d8a0009016fcbe97a06cf7e23; 8ba57771dd6345821a0cbe83c4c7eb50f66b7b65
- Self evaluation | papers: 2cdd5c3dc42c0df40bc8839709869af3560d4bfe; 142ebbf4760145f591166bde2564ac70c001e927; 04365f0f1db4c659c3297cb8e70c39b38ed3b487; accb2fab67c76d5668908107cd50cbb81110c389; c7ad19da81e24c387f0377fef6d19b0fce2cf470
- LLM collaboration | papers: 1bf7a2a27fc1f8db6e9404db1be3d355d65722fe; 25cee84e3a1541697a7c97443d7526574127c344; d77c78c9439422ed88e754f776a642d43a8acb66; ecdfc556828dc59d8a0009016fcbe97a06cf7e23; c7ad19da81e24c387f0377fef6d19b0fce2cf470; 8ba57771dd6345821a0cbe83c4c7eb50f66b7b65
